Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml

Class SamlAssertionValidator

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml.SamlAssertionValidator
public class SamlAssertionValidator extends Object
Validates a SAML 2.0 <samlp:Response> document and produces a ClaimsPrincipal marked with issuerType=SAML.

Wraps OpenSAML 5.x's parser, unmarshaller, signature validator, and (optionally) assertion decrypter. The validator enforces:

  • Mandatory signature on every assertion (or, optionally, on the <Response> envelope).
  • Strict signature-algorithm allowlist — only rsa-sha256 and ecdsa-sha256 are accepted out of the box. SHA-1 is permanently rejected.
  • Clock skew — defaults to 60 seconds tolerance on NotBefore / NotOnOrAfter; capped at 300 seconds.
  • Audience restriction — <AudienceRestriction> must list the configured SP entity ID.
  • Encrypted assertions — if the response contains <EncryptedAssertion>, a decryptionCredential must be configured.
Marker claim

The returned ClaimsPrincipal is annotated with issuerType=SAML so downstream code can distinguish SAML-derived principals from JWT-derived principals without resorting to a subclass:

if ("SAML".equals(principal.getClaim("issuerType", String.class).orElse(null))) { // SAML-issued principal }

Builder usage

var validator = SamlAssertionValidator.create() .metadataResolver(SamlMetadataResolvers.url("https://idp.example.com/metadata")) .spEntityId("https://sp.example.com") .expectedIssuer("https://idp.example.com") .build();

See Also:
  • SamlAuthFilter
  • SamlMetadataResolvers
  • SAML 2.0 Core (OASIS)
Since:
10.0.0

    • create

      public static SamlAssertionValidator.Builder create()
      Static creator.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • getSpEntityId

      public String getSpEntityId()
      Returns the SP entity ID this validator enforces in <AudienceRestriction>.
      Returns:
      The configured SP entity ID.

      public String getExpectedIssuer()
      Returns the expected IdP <Issuer> value.
      Returns:
      The expected issuer.

    • getAlgorithms

      public Set<String> getAlgorithms()
      Returns the configured signature algorithm allowlist.
      Returns:
      The unmodifiable allowlist.

    • getClockSkew

      public Duration getClockSkew()
      Returns the configured clock-skew tolerance.
      Returns:
      The clock skew.

    • validate

      public Principal validate(String xml) throws AuthenticationException
      Validates the supplied SAML 2.0 <samlp:Response> XML and returns the resolved principal.
      Parameters:
      xml - The full XML payload (already base64-decoded; already URL-decoded and inflated for the REDIRECT binding). Must be a <samlp:Response> envelope.
      Returns:
      A ClaimsPrincipal carrying the IdP-supplied claims plus the issuerType=SAML marker.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationException - If the response cannot be parsed or validation fails.
